what_it_does: This file is a YAML frontmatter record that registers an attachment (att-f3c5cde1) in the dragnet-development channel as a board_items attachment pointing to a specific board item.
observations: The entire content is YAML frontmatter with no body text
Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp
target uses a board:// URI referencing item-afe7b4bd
standouts: The target is a board://item-afe7b4bd URI, making this a cross-reference record
It is a minimal, timestamped ledger entry linking an attachment to a board item
conventions: Uses id, channel, attachment_type, target, added fields
Uses a URI scheme (board://) to identify the target object
notes: A timestamped channel attachment record that links attachment att-f3c5cde1 to board item item-afe7b4bd in dragnet-development.
questions: What content or state does board item item-afe7b4bd represent?
Is the relationship between attachment and board item intended to be bidirectional?
What does the board_items attachment_type imply about expected behavior or rendering?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is a board_items attachment targeting a board item, and the file content matches that exactly.
intention_signals: It appears to persist the fact that a specific attachment was added to a channel and associated with a board item, preserving the time and target of the linkage.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI scheme to identify the attachment target rather than a conventional file path or identifier.
contribution: Provides a precise, timestamped association between an attachment identifier and a board item, supporting reconstruction of channel-to-board relationships.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML metadata record for attachment att-f3c5cde1 in the dragnet-development channel, declaring it a board_items attachment targeting board item item-afe7b4bd with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This record was created to persist the fact that a board-item attachment was added to the channel at a specific time.
